entities.name: Decision Fatigue
entities.context: Cognitive burden that implicitly demanding recruiting messages create for recipients

entities.name: Recruiting Communication
entities.context: Domain of outreach messaging to candidates, typically framed as demanding

entities.name: Permission-Giving Language
entities.context: Technique of explicitly saying 'don't worry about it' to reduce pressure on recipients

relationships.context: Explicit permission-giving reduces decision fatigue by removing implicit demands
Most recruiting communication creates decision fatigue through implicit demands
Counterintuitive technique that may increase response rates in recruiting outreach
